text: ele hadevarim asher diber moshe el-kal-yiserael be'ever hayareden bamidebar ba'arava movl suf beyn-paran uveyn-tofel velavan vachatserot vedi zahav
achad 'asar yovm mechorev derekh har-se'ir 'ad qadesh barene'a
vayehi beareba'im shana be'ashetey-'asar chodesh beechad lachodesh diber moshe el-beney yiserael kekhol asher tsiva yehva otov alehem
acharey hakotov et sichon melekh haemori asher yovshev becheshebovn veet 'ovg melekh habashan asher-yovshev be'ashetarot beedere'i
be'ever hayareden beerets movav hovil moshe beer et-hatovra hazot lemor
yehva eloheynu diber eleynu bechorev lemor rav-lakhem shevet bahar haze
penu ׀ use'u lakhem uvou har haemori veel-kal-shekhenayv ba'arava vahar uvashefela uvanegev uvechovf hayam erets hakena'ani vehalevanovn 'ad-hanahar hagadol nehar-perat
ree natati lifeneykhem et-haarets bou ureshu et-haarets asher nisheba' yehva laavoteykhem leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov latet lahem ulezare'am achareyhem
vaomar alekhem ba'et hahiv lemor lo-ukhal levadi seet etekhem
yehva eloheykhem hireba etekhem vehinekhem hayovm kekhovkhevey hashamayim larov
yehva elohey avovtekhem yosef 'aleykhem kakhem elef pe'amim vivarekh etekhem kaasher diber lakhem
eykha esa levadi tarechakhem umasaakhem verivekhem
havu lakhem anashim chakhamim unevonim vidu'im leshiveteykhem vaasimem berasheykhem
vata'anu oti vatomeru tovv-hadavar asher-dibareta la'asovt
vaeqach et-rashey shiveteykhem anashim chakhamim vidu'im vaeten otam rashim 'aleykhem sarey alafim vesarey meovt vesarey chamishim vesarey 'asarot veshoterim leshiveteykhem
vaatsave et-shofeteykhem ba'et hahiv lemor shamo'a beyn-acheykhem ushefatetem tsedeq beyn-ish uveyn-achiv uveyn gerov
lo-takiru fanim bamishepat kaqaton kagadol tishema'un lo taguru mipeney-ish ki hamishepat lelohim hu vehadavar asher yiqeshe mikem taqerivun elay ushema'etiv
vaatsave etekhem ba'et hahiv et kal-hadevarim asher ta'asun
vanisa' mechorev vanelekh et kal-hamidebar hagadovl vehanovra hahu asher reitem derekh har haemori kaasher tsiva yehva eloheynu otanu vanavo 'ad qadesh barene'a
vaomar alekhem batem 'ad-har haemori asher-yehva eloheynu noten lanu
ree natan yehva eloheykha lefaneykha et-haarets 'ale resh kaasher diber yehva elohey avoteykha lakh al-tira veal-techat
vatiqerevun elay kulekhem vatomeru nishelecha anashim lefaneynu veyacheperu-lanu et-haarets veyashivu otanu davar et-haderekh asher na'aleh-bah veet he'arim asher navo aleyhen
vayitav be'eynay hadavar vaeqach mikem sheneym 'asar anashim ish echad lashavet
vayifenu vaya'alu hahara vayavou 'ad-nachal eshekol vayeragelu otah
vayiqechu veyadam miperi haarets vayovridu eleynu vayashivu otanu davar vayomeru tovva haarets asher-yehva eloheynu noten lanu
velo avitem la'alot vatameru et-pi yehva eloheykhem
vateragenu veaholeykhem vatomeru besineat yehva otanu hovtsianu meerets mitserayim latet otanu beyad haemori lehashemidenu
ana ׀ anachenu 'olim acheynu hemasu et-levavenu lemor 'am gadovl varam mimenu 'arim gedolot uvetsurot bashamayim vegam-beney 'anaqim rainu sham
vaomar alekhem lo-ta'aretsun velo-tireun mehem
yehva eloheykhem haholekh lifeneykhem hu yilachem lakhem kekhol asher 'asa itekhem bemitserayim le'eyneykhem
uvamidebar asher raita asher nesaakha yehva eloheykha kaasher yisa-ish et-benov bekhal-haderekh asher halakhetem 'ad-boakhem 'ad-hamaqovm haze
uvadavar haze eynekhem maaminim bayhva eloheykhem
haholekh lifeneykhem baderekh latur lakhem maqovm lachanotekhem baesh ׀ layela lareotekhem baderekh asher telekhu-vah uve'anan yovmam
vayishema' yehva et-qovl divereykhem vayiqetsof vayishava' lemor
im-yiree ish baanashim haele hadovr hara' haze et haarets hatovva asher nisheba'eti latet laavoteykhem
zulati kalev ben-yefune hu yireena velov-eten et-haarets asher darakhe-bah ulevanayv ya'an asher mile acharey yehva
gam-bi hiteanaf yehva bigelalekhem lemor gam-ata lo-tavo sham
yehovshu'a bin-nun ha'omed lefaneykha hu yavo shama otov chazeq ki-hu yanechilena et-yiserael
vetapekhem asher amaretem lavaz yiheye uveneykhem asher lo-yade'u hayovm tovv vara' hema yavou shama velahem etenena vehem yirashuha
veatem penu lakhem use'u hamidebara derekh yam-suf
vata'anu ׀ vatomeru elay chatanu layhva anachenu na'ale venilechamenu kekhol asher-tsivanu yehva eloheynu vatachegeru ish et-keley milechametov vatahinu la'alot hahara
vayomer yehva elay emor lahem lo ta'alu velo-tilachamu ki eyneni beqirebekhem velo tinagefu lifeney oyeveykhem
vaadaber aleykhem velo shema'etem vatameru et-pi yehva vatazidu vata'alu hahara
vayetse haemori hayoshev bahar hahu liqeratekhem vayiredefu etekhem kaasher ta'aseyna hadevorim vayaketu etekhem bese'ir 'ad-charema
vatashuvu vativeku lifeney yehva velo-shama' yehva beqolekhem velo heezin aleykhem
vateshevu veqadesh yamim rabim kayamim asher yeshavetem
vanefen vanisa' hamidebara derekh yam-suf kaasher diber yehva elay vanasav et-har-se'ir yamim rabim s
vayomer yehva elay lemor
rav-lakhem sov et-hahar haze penu lakhem tsafona
veet-ha'am tsav lemor atem 'overim bigevul acheykhem beney-'esav hayoshevim bese'ir veyireu mikem venishemaretem meod
al-titegaru vam ki lo-eten lakhem mearetsam 'ad miderakh kaf-ragel ki-yerusha le'esav natati et-har se'ir
okhel tisheberu meitam bakesef vaakhaletem vegam-mayim tikheru meitam bakesef ushetitem
ki yehva eloheykha berakhekha bekhol ma'ase yadekha yada' lekhetekha et-hamidebar hagadol haze ze ׀ areba'im shana yehva eloheykha 'imakh lo chasareta davar
vana'avor meet acheynu veney-'esav hayoshevim bese'ir miderekh ha'arava meeylat ume'etseyon gaver s vanefen vana'avor derekh midebar movav
vayomer yehva elay el-tatsar et-movav veal-titegar bam milechama ki lo-eten lekha mearetsov yerusha ki liveney-lovt natati et-'ar yerusha ׃
haemim lefanim yashevu vah 'am gadovl verav varam ka'anaqim
refaim yechashevu af-hem ka'anaqim vehamoavim yiqereu lahem emim
uvese'ir yashevu hachorim lefanim uveney 'esav yirashum vayashemidum mipeneyhem vayeshevu tachetam kaasher 'asa yiserael leerets yerushatov asher-natan yehva lahem
'ata qumu ve'iveru lakhem et-nachal zared vana'avor et-nachal zared
vehayamim asher-halakhenu ׀ miqadesh barene'a 'ad asher-'avarenu et-nachal zered sheloshim ushemone shana 'ad-tom kal-hadovr aneshey hamilechama miqerev hamachane kaasher nisheba' yehva lahem
vegam yad-yehva hayeta bam lehumam miqerev hamachane 'ad tumam
vayehi khaasher-tamu kal-aneshey hamilechama lamut miqerev ha'am s

ata 'over hayovm et-gevul movav et-'ar
veqaraveta mul beney 'amovn al-tetsurem veal-titegar bam ki lo-eten meerets beney-'amovn lekha yerusha ki liveney-lovt netatiha yerusha
erets-refaim techashev af-hiv refaim yashevu-vah lefanim veha'amonim yiqereu lahem zamezumim
'am gadovl verav varam ka'anaqim vayashemidem yehva mipeneyhem vayirashum vayeshevu tachetam
kaasher 'asa liveney 'esav hayoshevim bese'ir asher hishemid et-hachori mipeneyhem vayirashum vayeshevu tachetam 'ad hayovm haze
veha'avim hayoshevim bachatserim 'ad-'aza kafetorim hayotseim mikafetovr hishemidum vayeshevu tachetam
qumu se'u ve'iveru et-nachal arenon ree natati veyadekha et-sichon melekhe-cheshebovn haemori veet-aretsov hachel rash vehitegar bov milechama
hayovm haze achel tet pachedekha veyireatekha 'al-peney ha'amim tachat kal-hashamayim asher yisheme'un shime'akha veragezu vechalu mipaneykha ׃
vaeshelach maleakhim mimidebar qedemovt el-sichovn melekh cheshebovn diverey shalovm lemor
e'ebera vearetsekha baderekh baderekh elekh lo asur yamin usemovl
okhel bakesef tashebireni veakhaleti umayim bakesef titen-li veshatiti raq e'ebera veragelay

vaniqach ba'et hahiv et-haarets miyad sheney malekhey haemori asher be'ever hayareden minachal arenon 'ad-har cheremovn
tsidonim yiqereu lecheremovn sireyon vehaemori yiqereu-lov senir
kol ׀ 'arey hamishor vekhal-hagile'ad vekhal-habashan 'ad-salekha veedere'i 'arey mamelekhet 'ovg babashan
ki raq-'ovg melekh habashan nishear miyeter harefaim hine 'aresov 'eres barezel halo hiv berabat beney 'amovn tesha' amovt arekah veareba' amovt rachebah beamat-ish
veet-haarets hazot yarashenu ba'et hahiv me'aro'er asher-'al-nachal arenon vachatsi har-hagile'ad ve'arayv natati laruuveni velagadi
veyeter hagile'ad vekhal-habashan mamelekhet 'ovg natati lachatsi shevet hamenashe kol chevel haaregov lekhal-habashan hahu yiqare erets refaim
yair ben-menashe laqach et-kal-chevel aregov 'ad-gevul hageshuri vehama'akhati vayiqera otam 'al-shemov et-habashan chaot yair 'ad hayovm haze
ulemakhir natati et-hagile'ad
velaruuveni velagadi natati min-hagile'ad ve'ad-nachal arenon tovkh hanachal ugevul ve'ad yaboq hanachal gevul beney 'amovn
veha'arava vehayareden ugevul mikineret ve'ad yam ha'arava yam hamelach tachat ashedot hapisega mizeracha
vaatsav etekhem ba'et hahiv lemor yehva eloheykhem natan lakhem et-haarets hazot lerishetah chalutsim ta'averu lifeney acheykhem beney-yiserael kal-beney-chayil
raq nesheykhem vetapekhem umiqenekhem yada'eti ki-miqene rav lakhem yeshevu be'areykhem asher natati lakhem
'ad asher-yanicha yehva ׀ laacheykhem kakhem veyareshu gam-hem et-haarets asher yehva eloheykhem noten lahem be'ever hayareden veshavetem ish lirushatov asher natati lakhem
veet-yehovshu'a tsiveyti ba'et hahiv lemor 'eyneykha haroot et kal-asher 'asa yehva eloheykhem lisheney hamelakhim haele ken-ya'ase yehva lekhal-hamamelakhovt asher ata 'over shama
lo tiraum ki yehva eloheykhem hu hanilecham lakhem s
vaetechanan el-yehva ba'et hahiv lemor
adonay yehvi ata hachilovta lehareovt et-'avedekha et-gadelekha veet-yadekha hachazaqa asher mi-el bashamayim uvaarets asher-ya'ase khema'aseykha vekhigevurotekha
e'eberah-na veeree et-haarets hatovva asher be'ever hayareden hahar hatovv haze vehalevanovn
vayite'aber yehva bi lema'anekhem velo shama' elay vayomer yehva elay rav-lakh al-tovsef daber elay 'ovd badavar haze
'ale ׀ rosh hapisega vesa 'eyneykha yama vetsafona veteymana umizeracha uree ve'eyneykha ki-lo ta'avor et-hayareden haze
vetsav et-yehovshu'a vechazeqehu veametsehu ki-hu ya'avor lifeney ha'am haze vehu yanechil ovtam et-haarets asher tiree
vaneshev bagaye mul beyt pe'ovr f
ve'ata yiserael shema' el-hachuqim veel-hamishepatim asher anokhi melamed etekhem la'asovt lema'an ticheyu uvatem virishetem et-haarets asher yehva elohey avoteykhem noten lakhem
lo tosifu 'al-hadavar asher anokhi metsave etekhem velo tigere'u mimenu lishemor et-mitseot yehva eloheykhem asher anokhi metsave etekhem
'eyneykhem haroot et asher-'asa yehva beva'al pe'ovr ki khal-haish asher halakh acharey va'al-pe'ovr hishemidov yehva eloheykha miqirebekha
veatem hadeveqim bayhva eloheykhem chayim kulekhem hayovm
ree ׀ limadeti etekhem chuqim umishepatim kaasher tsivani yehva elohay la'asovt ken beqerev haarets asher atem baim shama lerishetah
ushemaretem va'asitem ki hiv chakhematekhem uvinatekhem le'eyney ha'amim asher yisheme'un et kal-hachuqim haele veameru raq 'am-chakham venavovn hagovy hagadovl haze
ki mi-govy gadovl asher-lov elohim qerovim elayv kayhva eloheynu bekhal-qareenu elayv
umi govy gadovl asher-lov chuqim umishepatim tsadiqim kekhol hatovra hazot asher anokhi noten lifeneykhem hayovm
raq hishamer lekha ushemor nafeshekha meod pen-tishekach et-hadevarim asher-rau 'eyneykha ufen-yasuru milevavekha kol yemey chayeykha vehovda'etam levaneykha veliveney vaneykha

yovm asher 'amadeta lifeney yehva eloheykha bechorev beemor yehva elay haqehel-li et-ha'am veashemi'em et-devaray asher yilemedun leyirea oti kal-hayamim asher hem chayim 'al-haadama veet-beneyhem yelamedun
vatiqerevun vata'amedun tachat hahar vehahar bo'er baesh 'ad-lev hashamayim choshekh 'anan va'arafel
vayedaber yehva aleykhem mitovkh haesh qovl devarim atem shome'im utemuna eynekhem roim zulati qovl
vayaged lakhem et-beritov asher tsiva etekhem la'asovt 'aseret hadevarim vayikhetevem 'al-sheney luchovt avanim
veoti tsiva yehva ba'et hahiv lelamed etekhem chuqim umishepatim la'asotekhem otam baarets asher atem 'overim shama lerishetah
venishemaretem meod lenafeshoteykhem ki lo reitem kal-temuna beyovm diber yehva aleykhem bechorev mitovkh haesh
pen-tashechitun va'asitem lakhem pesel temunat kal-samel tavenit zakhar ov neqeva
tavenit kal-behema asher baarets tavenit kal-tsipovr kanaf asher ta'uf bashamayim
tavenit kal-romes baadama tavenit kal-daga asher-bamayim mitachat laarets

ufen-tisa 'eyneykha hashamayema veraita et-hashemesh veet-hayarecha veet-hakovkhavim kol tseva hashamayim venidacheta vehishetachavita lahem va'avadetam asher chalaq yehva eloheykha otam lekhol ha'amim tachat kal-hashamayim
veetekhem laqach yehva vayovtsi etekhem mikur habarezel mimitserayim liheyovt lov le'am nachala kayovm haze
vayhva hiteanef-bi 'al-divereykhem vayishava' levileti 'averi et-hayareden ulevileti-vo el-haarets hatovva asher yehva eloheykha noten lekha nachala
ki anokhi met baarets hazot eyneni 'over et-hayareden veatem 'overim virishetem et-haarets hatovva hazot
hishameru lakhem pen-tishekechu et-berit yehva eloheykhem asher karat 'imakhem va'asitem lakhem pesel temunat kol asher tsivekha yehva eloheykha
ki yehva eloheykha esh okhela hu el qana f
ki-tovlid banim uveney vanim venovshanetem baarets vehishechatem va'asitem pesel temunat kol va'asitem hara' be'eyney yehvah-eloheykha lehakhe'isov
ha'idoti vakhem hayovm et-hashamayim veet-haarets ki-avod tovedun maher me'al haarets asher atem 'overim et-hayareden shama lerishetah lo-taarikhun yamim 'aleyha ki hishamed tishamedun
vehefits yehva etekhem ba'amim venishearetem metey misepar bagovyim asher yenaheg yehva etekhem shama
va'avadetem-sham elohim ma'ase yedey adam 'ets vaeven asher lo-yireun velo yisheme'un velo yokhelun velo yerichun
uviqashetem misham et-yehva eloheykha umatsata ki tidereshenu bekhal-levavekha uvekhal-nafeshekha
batsar lekha umetsaukha kol hadevarim haele beacharit hayamim veshaveta 'ad-yehva eloheykha veshama'eta beqolov
ki el rachum yehva eloheykha lo yarepekha velo yashechitekha velo yishekach et-berit avoteykha asher nisheba' lahem
ki sheal-na leyamim rishonim asher-hayu lefaneykha lemin-hayovm asher bara elohim ׀ adam 'al-haarets ulemiqetse hashamayim ve'ad-qetse hashamayim haniheya kadavar hagadovl haze ov hanishema' kamohu
hashama' 'am qovl elohim medaber mitovkhe-haesh kaasher-shama'eta ata vayechi

ov ׀ hanisa elohim lavov laqachat lov govy miqerev govy bemasot beotot uvemovfetim uvemilechama uveyad chazaqa uvizerov'a netuya uvemovraim gedolim kekhol asher-'asa lakhem yehva eloheykhem bemitserayim le'eyneykha
ata hareeta lada'at ki yehva hu haelohim eyn 'ovd milevadov
min-hashamayim hishemi'akha et-qolov leyasereka ve'al-haarets hereakha et-ishov hagedovla udevarayv shama'eta mitovkh haesh
vetachat ki ahav et-avoteykha vayivechar bezare'ov acharayv vayovtsiakha befanayv bekhochov hagadol mimitserayim
lehovrish govyim gedolim va'atsumim mimekha mipaneykha lahaviakha latet-lekha et-aretsam nachala kayovm haze
veyada'eta hayovm vahashevota el-levavekha ki yehva hu haelohim bashamayim mima'al ve'al-haarets mitachat eyn 'ovd

yehva eloheynu karat 'imanu berit bechorev
lo et-avoteynu karat yehva et-haberit hazot ki itanu anachenu ele fo hayovm kulanu chayim
panim ׀ befanim diber yehva 'imakhem bahar mitovkh haesh
anokhi 'omed beyn-yehva uveyneykhem ba'et hahiv lehagid lakhem et-devar yehva ki yeretem mipeney haesh velo-'alitem bahar lemor s
